groupings.title: Write it right
groupings.description: Linting, strict TypeScript, and tests that fail loudly - the gates that catch defects before review does.

groupings.title: Ship to npm
groupings.description: From exports map to signed release: packages that resolve for every consumer and publish with provenance, no stored tokens.

groupings.title: Guard the pipeline
groupings.description: CI that fails closed and dependencies that cannot sneak malware in - engines-derived matrices, cooldowns, pinned actions.

groupings.title: Next.js, production-grade
groupings.description: App Router hardening: server/client boundaries, Next-native lint, and bundle work that is measured, not vibes.
